title: FATA[0000] Error creating signature: Invalid crypto engine
body:
OS: Ubuntu Xenial 16.04
I installed skopeo using:
`sudo snap install --edge --devmode skopeo`

```
sudo skopeo --version
skopeo version 0.1.36-dev commit: daa085bfdc10a9afc608317abb00137a71ce989f
```

```
sudo skopeo --debug standalone-sign docker-signing/manifest.json docker://us.icr.io/docker-signing/docker-signing:latest 9500ED070CC03B803CD216DFAB3D3BE659967254 -o docker-signing/signature
FATA[0000] Error creating signature: Invalid crypto engine
```

How do I resolve this?

comments.body: I installed skopeo version 0.1.40 and that resolved the issue.
